Mol* viewer build vendored from the npm "molstar" package.
Version: 5.10.1
Files: molstar.js, molstar.css (from build/viewer/)
Source maps (*.map) intentionally omitted to keep the repo lean.
Re-vendor: npm pack molstar && tar xzf molstar-*.tgz && cp package/build/viewer/molstar.{js,css} here

LOCAL PATCH: molstar.js is patched for CHARMM membranes — (1) its lipid-name set
is extended with residues Mol* doesn't ship (CHL1/cholesterol, PSM/sphingomyelin,
SOPE/SOPS, ...) so they classify/render as lipids, and (2) the "Residue Name"
color theme's map gets distinct colors for lipid residue names (else all lipids
share the one "Unknown" color). Both edits are overwritten when re-vendoring
above — re-apply with:  python tools/patch_molstar_lipids.py
(idempotent; see that script for the full lists).
